title: styrax officinalis var. fulvescens
intro: Styrax officinalis var. fulvescens is a variant of the Styrax officinalis tree, also known as the Liquid Amber or American Sweetgum, which is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Styrax officinalis var. fulvescens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include the bark, which can be used to make a tincture, infused oil, or salve for topical application to benefit from its medicinal properties.
